s1_ready.provisional_note: MINTED in P3 (task 077) — the F2 fixture's post-settle READY frame, glanced after pane.wait_settled returns settled=true. P3 changes NO rendering code (settle is a pure watch-channel wait + the shux-vt monotonic clock exposed public); this golden is produced by the SAME P2-approved raster + harness fixture-font chain on the FROZEN F2 fixture. Visually inspected by the implementing agent (LENS-F2-SPIN sentinel, amber braille spinner at grid (1,1), green-bold READY at grid (11,34), truecolor + 256-color + basic-color legend rows — no monochrome regression). AWAITS downstream verifier + shux QA + DootSabha council ratification per the standing chain (P3 has no SOLID VT QA gate in PRD sec14; sec16.3 approval is deferred to that chain — the implementation does NOT self-certify this as an approved baseline).
